title: 応募は公式リウマート

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh! A campaign to give away official Horsegirl pics,
eh? I gotta repost this ASA—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Th-this can't be... How did I, of all people, fail to
notice something on Umatter that's been
reposted 1,254 times?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Groan. Reposting now won't do a thing besides being a huge humiliation to my Umas...
